title: Email composition
description: Full email — greeting, body, signature, sign-off
text: Hi Alex, I hope you're well. Can we meet at 2:30 PM tomorrow? I'd like to discuss the Q3 plan. Best regards, Sam Smith sam@team.co

tips.text: Begin every sentence with a capital - Shift and the letter together, one motion.
A good email has a shape: greeting, the point, sign-off, name, contact. Say it plainly and stop.

tips.target: Hi Alex, I hope you're well. Can we meet at 2:30 PM

tips.text: Around 180 characters - the length of a note someone actually reads. Cut the clutter so the point survives.

tips.target: tomorrow? I'd like to discuss the Q3 plan. Best regards, Sam Smith sam@team.co

character_tips.anna: Email is the writing you do most. Get fluent here and the day moves faster.
character_tips.maxim: Clear, structured, short - the three virtues of a work email. Practice all three at once.
character_tips.knopych: A real message, start to finish. That's the job.
character_tips.klavochka: A note to a colleague is still a note. Write it so they're glad to read it.
